title: IIT Delhi is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IIT Delhi is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
